nanobanana.description: Core image generation engine using Gemini Image API. Character consistency, style seeds, multi-scene brand-aligned generation.

product-studio.description: Automated product photography pipeline. Pack shots, lifestyle scenes, e-commerce assets, model shots with demographic diversity.
outputs: PNG images (6-8 pack shots, 4-6 lifestyle, 3-4 model)

ad-composer.description: Unified ad image generation CLI wrapping NanoBanana, Recraft V4, and Flux 2 Pro. Brand-aware prompt enrichment.

brand-studio.description: Brand-aware ad generation with visual QA scoring against real brand references. Generate-Audit-Refine loop.

creative-studio.description: Control room for character and asset creation. Orchestrates refs, generation engine, visual registry, review, and approval.

ig-character-gen.description: Instagram content library generator for AI influencer characters. Authentic iPhone-quality daily life images in Western city settings.

jade-content-studio.description: Unified AI character content pipeline for Jade Oracle. Character creation, face lock, body pairing, IG content, ad hooks, quality gates.

brand-prompt-library.description: 200+ curated prompt packs for AI image generation across all GAIA brands. F&B photography, wellness lifestyle, product shots, campaign visuals.

style-control.description: Brand visual identity management. Explore styles, mood presets, style seeds, color palettes for consistent brand generation.

character-lock.description: Face lock and body consistency rules for NanoBanana character generation. Learned from Luna Solaris v3 failures.

clip-factory.description: Long video to short viral clips. Transcribe, detect scenes, score virality via LLM, extract ranked clips, apply post-production.

video-compiler.description: Automated UGC video ad production. Takes brief, outputs ready-to-publish video ads. AIDA block taxonomy, combinatorial generation.
outputs: video ads (30-50s assembled, 12s single-shot, N combinatorial variants)

video-forge.description: Automated video post-production. Captioning (Whisper), branding (logo/watermark), music mixing, effects, multi-platform export.

ai-voiceover.description: AI voice generation for video ads and brand audio. Multi-language (EN/BM/ZH), brand-matched voice profiles.

video-gen.description: Unified video generation CLI. Kling AI, Wan 2.2 (fal.ai), Sora 2 (OpenAI). Text-to-video and image-to-video.

content-repurpose.description: One hero asset auto-reformatted into 10+ platform variants. IG Feed, Stories, Reels, FB, TikTok, Shopee, WhatsApp, EDM, LinkedIn, X, Pinterest.

campaign-translate.description: Multilingual transcreation engine. Adapts ad copy, captions, video subtitles across EN/BM/ZH preserving brand voice and conversion intent.

campaign-planner.description: Campaign brief generation engine. Structured ad campaign briefs from template taxonomy and strategic directions.

content-supply-chain.description: Self-improving creative loop. Research-Strategy-Brief-Create-Produce-Distribute-Analyze-Learn-Loop. Each cycle compounds.

audience-simulator.description: Pre-test content by simulating audience reactions with persona-based LLM agents. Score before spending budget.

fast-iterate.description: Pre-ship quality multiplier. Generate N variants, score via LLM-as-judge, identify winner, rewrite prompt with learnings, repeat K rounds.

content-tuner.description: Self-tuning engine. Reads winning patterns, promotes outperformers (3+ data points, >20% improvement), flags underperformers.

notebooklm-research.description: Deep research pipeline using Google NotebookLM for source analysis and knowledge synthesis, feeding into Claude for content creation.

rigour.description: Mandatory quality gate for all AI-generated code. Syntax check, lint, basic tests, security scan. Must pass before shipping.

visual-registry.description: Multi-angle asset registration for SKUs, characters, models, scenes, props. Assembly engine combines assets for consistent generation.

image-seed-bank.description: Image asset management. Store, query, promote, and export generated images with metadata: brand, campaign, tags, performance.

social-publish.description: Instagram publishing pipeline via Meta Graph API. Posts images, carousels, reels. Token management, scheduling, health checks.

creative-intake.description: Reference-to-Production Machine. Any input (link, image, video, text brief) gets auto-classified, analyzed, and routed to the right production workflow.
accepts: any creative input (link, image, video, text brief)

art-director.description: World-class art director with 30 years of experience. Design critique, visual review, aesthetic guidance at Pentagram/MUJI level.

ref-picker.description: Unified catalog and picker for all reference images across GAIA OS. Browse, search, and auto-suggest best refs for any use case.

pinterest-ref.description: Extract visual references from Pinterest pins and boards. Generate structured visual DNA analysis for character design and brand identity.

grabfood-enhance.description: GrabFood menu photo enhancement. Background removal, pro lighting, Grab-optimized thumbnails. Replaces FoodShot AI.

ai-influencer.description: End-to-end AI influencer factory. Create, produce, and scale AI character content across TikTok, Reels, Shorts. Face consistency, voice cloning, lip sync, auto-posting.

onboard-brand.description: New brand creation pipeline. AI-assisted identity design — colors, voice, tone, audience, DNA.json generation, brand directory setup.
